nodes.name: ci.yml
nodes.summary: Primary CI pipeline running tests across a 3×3×4 OS/Node/package-manager matrix, component validation (agents, hooks, commands, skills, install manifests, workflow security, rules, catalog), security audit, code coverage, and ESLint/markdownlint linting on every push to main or release branches and on all pull requests.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses concurrency groups to cancel duplicate runs and pins all action SHAs for supply-chain hardness.

nodes.name: generator-generic-ossf-slsa3-publish.yml
nodes.summary: Generates SLSA level-3 provenance for the npm package artifact on every published GitHub Release, building the package, hashing it, and delegating to the slsa-framework reusable generator workflow to produce a signed attestation.
nodes.languageNotes: Delegates provenance signing to the upstream slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator reusable workflow at a pinned SHA.

nodes.name: maintenance.yml
nodes.summary: Weekly scheduled maintenance pipeline that checks for outdated npm packages, runs a security audit, and marks stale issues and pull requests for closure using the actions/stale action.

nodes.name: monthly-metrics.yml
nodes.summary: Monthly scheduled pipeline that collects npm download counts, GitHub repo stats (stars, forks, contributors, releases), and traffic data for ecc-universal and ecc-agentshield, then upserts a running metrics table into a pinned GitHub issue for sponsor and partner reporting.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses actions/github-script with an inline JavaScript payload (~180 lines) that calls both the GitHub REST API and npmjs.org download API.

nodes.name: release-announce.yml
nodes.summary: Triggers on GitHub Release publication and posts an announcement to a Discord channel and GitHub Discussions by running the scripts/discord/release-announce.mjs script with release metadata injected as environment variables.

nodes.name: release.yml
nodes.summary: Tag-triggered release pipeline that verifies the version tag format, checks package.json alignment, runs an IOC supply-chain scan, packs the npm artifact, creates a GitHub Release with generated highlights, and publishes to npm with provenance attestation.
nodes.languageNotes: Splits work into a verify job and a publish job to keep npm credentials narrowly scoped to the final publish step.

nodes.name: reusable-release.yml
nodes.summary: Reusable workflow (workflow_call + workflow_dispatch) that encapsulates the full verify-then-publish release sequence for a given tag, enabling callers to trigger or re-trigger a release without pushing a new tag.
nodes.languageNotes: Mirrors release.yml logic but takes the tag as a workflow input, making it independently invocable from the GitHub UI or other workflows.

nodes.name: reusable-test.yml
nodes.summary: Reusable workflow (workflow_call) that runs the full test suite for a configurable OS, Node.js version, and package manager, mirroring the ci.yml test job for composition by other workflows.
nodes.languageNotes: Parameterized via workflow_call inputs so callers control the OS, Node version, and package manager without duplicating setup logic.

nodes.name: reusable-validate.yml
nodes.summary: Reusable workflow (workflow_call) that runs the full ECC component validation suite — agents, hooks, commands, skills, install manifests, workflow security, rules, unicode safety, and no-personal-paths checks — against a configurable Node.js version.
nodes.languageNotes: Intended to be called from ci.yml or other orchestrators, centralising all component-level validate-*.js script invocations.

nodes.name: supply-chain-watch.yml
nodes.summary: Runs every 6 hours to verify npm registry signatures, run IOC (indicators of compromise) scans against fixture snapshots, refresh advisory source data, validate workflow hardening rules, and upload a JSON report artifact for audit trail purposes.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a non-cancel-in-progress concurrency setting so no scheduled watch run is silently skipped.
